title: Journium InsightTracker
description: Root schema for all Journium InsightTracker versions. Dispatches to the correct version-specific schema based on apiVersion. Supported versions: 'journium.app/v0Alpha' (legacy), 'journium.app/v0Beta' (current, recommended for all new trackers).

apiVersion.description: Schema version discriminant. Must be exactly 'journium.app/v0Alpha' (legacy) or 'journium.app/v0Beta' (current). Always use 'journium.app/v0Beta' for new trackers — it provides typed analysis, structured aggregation, and richer LLM prompt variables.
